title: Error deleting a running execution
symptom: When trying to delete a running execution via the API, the error 'Cannot delete a running execution' is returned.
not_this_if: Using the correct endpoint for stopping executions
root_cause: The delete execution endpoint cannot be used on executions that are currently running. This restriction is in place to prevent data inconsistency and ensure proper workflow execution.
fix_steps: Check the execution status before attempting to delete
If the execution is running, consider using a different method to stop it, such as setting a shared flag
agent_instruction: Do not attempt to delete running executions; use alternative methods to manage workflow execution.
